extra.reason: Implemented SEE and integrated into MoveOrdering and QuiescenceSearch

Implemented bitboard representation with bigint. Added Bitboard.ts utilities, AttackTables.ts with precomputed attacks, augmented Board.ts with hybrid array+bitboard storage, rewrote AttackDetector.ts and SEE to use bitboard lookups.

Implemented Texel's Tuning Method script (scripts/texel-tuning.ts) to automatically optimize evaluation weights using local search against a dataset of labeled chess positions (EPD). Added 'tune' command to package.json.
Implemented basic CPU-friendly NNUE architecture (768->32->1) with an incrementally updated Accumulator attached to Board state. Integrated NnueEvaluator behind a toggle flag in Evaluator.
